name: Apollo Tourism & Leisure Ltd
summary: Apollo Tourism & Leisure Ltd, a tourism leisure company, manufactures, imports, rents, sells, and distributes recreational vehicles in Australia, New Zealand, North America, Germany, the United Kingdom, and Ireland. The company offers motorhomes, campervans, and caravans under the Fleetwood RV, Winnebago, Coromal, Windsor, Adria, and Talvor brands. It also sells new and used motorhomes and caravans; and ex-rental motorhomes. In addition, the company is involved in online accessories sale and labor hire business. Apollo Tourism & Leisure Ltd offers its products through a network of dealers and retail shopfronts. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Northgate, Australia. Apollo Tourism & Leisure Ltd is a subsidiary of Lurk Investment Trust.
